---
title: "102: Julius Peppers"
date: "2024-07-31"
categories:
  - gt
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
editor: visual
---

### Make data

```{r load-data, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# scrape data manually via goheels.com 
# https://s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/sidearm.nextgen.sites/unc.sidearmsports.com/documents/2013/3/4/PeppersJ_2002bio.pdf?timestamp=20170525102835
pep <- tibble::tribble(
  ~year,~g1,~g2,~g3,~g4,~g5,~g6,~g7,~g8,~g9,~g10,
  1999,"football","football","football","football","football","football","football","football","football","football",
  1999,"football","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","basketball","basketball","basketball","pepper-hot","basketball",
  2000,"basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball", 
  2000,"basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball", "basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball",
  2000,"basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball", "basketball","basketball","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","pepper-hot",
  2000,"football","football","football","football","football","football","football","football","football","football",
  2000,"football","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","basketball",
  2001,"basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball",
  2001,"basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball",
  2001,"basketball","basketball","basketball","basketball","football","football","football","football","football","football",
  2001,"football","football","football","football","football","football","football","pepper-hot","pepper-hot","pepper-hot",
 )

```

### GT Table

```{r gt-table, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
custom_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_1456,c_limit,f_webp,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F573406b8-7d83-417d-a986-41d05604566b_900x698.jpeg'
       style='height: 90px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>Julius Peppers</span><span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 18px;'>Dominant Two-Sport Athlete</span>
       <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Peppers played in 35 football games and 56 basketball games from 1999 to 2001 at North Carolina.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_1456,c_limit,f_webp,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F77203f97-5d4c-4670-9647-4d772c18c492_900x698.jpeg' 
       style='height: 90px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>
       <hr>"
)


pep |> 
  gt::gt() |> 
  gt::fmt_icon(columns = -c(year),
               fill_color = list("football" = "#825736", 
                                 "basketball" = "#F88158",
                                 "pepper-hot" = "#e6e6e6")) |> 
  gt::cols_label(
    year = "",
    g1 = "",
    g2 = "",
    g3 = "",
    g4 = "",
    g5 = "",
    g6 = "",
    g7 = "",
    g8 = "",
    g9 = "",
    g10 = ""
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_spanner(columns = c(year), 
                  label = "Year") |> 
  gt::tab_spanner(columns = -c(year),
                  label = gt::html("Football & Basketball Games Played<br><span style='font-weight: normal; text-transform: none;'>Each square represents a game played</span>")) |> 
  gtExtras::gt_theme_nytimes() |> 
    gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |> 
  gt::tab_source_note(source_note = gt::html(
    "<hr>
    <b>Peppers accolades at North Carolina</b>
    <ul>
    <li>2001 unanimous first-team football All-America, won the Chuck Bednarik and Lombardi Award, and Bill Willis Trophy.</li>
    <li>Played in 56 of a possible 69 games over two basketball seasons, including key minutes en route to 2000 Final Four.</li>
    <li>Drafted 2nd overall in 2002 NFL Draft and inducted in Pro Football Hall of Fame in 2024.</li>
    </ul>
    <hr>
    Data via goheels.com, photos from the Associated Press
    <hr>
    <b>Table by Chris (@dadgumboxscores) + Bless your chart</b>"
  )
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_align(
    align = c("center"),
    columns = everything()
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_options (
    source_notes.font.size = gt::px(10),
    row.striping.background_color = 'white',
    table.font.size = gt::px(16),
    column_labels.text_transform = 'uppercase',
    column_labels.font.weight = 'bold'
  ) -> pep_tbl
  


gtExtras::gtsave_extra(pep_tbl,
                       filename = "pep-tbl.png",
                       vwidth = 675,
                       expand = 10)

pep_tbl

```

###
